channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 64/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 64/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

item.title: The Guardian: Starmer’s top advisers knew about ‘indefensible’ journalists probe, documents reveal - The Guardian
item.description: Starmer’s top advisers knew about ‘indefensible’ journalists probe, documents reveal - The Guardian

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: This is so right. People don’t like Starmer because of his hair colour
www.theguardian.com/politics/202...
item.description:
This is so right. People don’t like Starmer because of his hair colour
www.theguardian.com/politics/202...

item.title: The Guardian: Burnham to back Shabana Mahmood’s immigration changes, allies say - The Guardian
item.description: Burnham to back Shabana Mahmood’s immigration changes, allies say - The Guardian

item.title: The Guardian: Labour must be bolder or it will lose, Streeting says in resignation speech - The Guardian
item.description: Labour must be bolder or it will lose, Streeting says in resignation speech - The Guardian

item.title: The Times: Labour’s gender critical women tell Burnham to clarify his views on trans rights - The Times
item.description: Labour’s gender critical women tell Burnham to clarify his views on trans rights - The Times

item.title: Independent UK Politics: UK condemns Israeli minister for taunting bound and kneeling Gaza flotilla activists
item.description: UK condemns Israeli minister for taunting bound and kneeling Gaza flotilla activists

item.title:
Bluesky · @pippacrerar.bsky.social: EXCL: Andy Burnham is backing Shabana Mahmood’s controversial changes to immigration system, allies have said, in blow to those in Labour who would soften them.
GM mayor is understood to be keen to reframe changes - ...
item.description:
EXCL: Andy Burnham is backing Shabana Mahmood’s controversial changes to immigration system, allies have said, in blow to those in Labour who would soften them.
GM mayor is understood to be keen to reframe changes - ...

item.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: The 2026 Labour leadership contest is a large scale social experiment to determine what exactly it would take to get BlueSky to begrudgingly root for Wes Streeting
item.description: The 2026 Labour leadership contest is a large scale social experiment to determine what exactly it would take to get BlueSky to begrudgingly root for Wes Streeting
